2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch exports the mhp_get_default_online_type function from the mm/memory_hotplug module, allowing drivers to use it when hotplug is disabled. The function returns MMOP_OFFLINE by default as it's non-destructive and can't return -1. This change enables drivers like cxl that co-mingle hotplug and DAX use-cases to build even when hotplug is disabled.
